components.rationale: No existing horizontal course card. Considered apps/web/src/components/ui/program-card.tsx — it is a vertical card (image-top 413x235 aspect, then header/footer column) used in the Programs grid; the new CourseCard is horizontal (447x362 hero image on the left half, right column with eyebrow/title/body/4 feature tiles/CTA at 1308x362). Shape, slot composition, and aspect ratios diverge enough that forcing a variant into ProgramCard would mean two parallel layouts inside one component. Also considered the base Card primitive (apps/web/src/components/ui/card.tsx) — its slots (CardHeader/CardContent/CardFooter) are column-stacked and rely on `*:[img:first-child]:rounded-t-lg`, which is wrong for a left-side image. CourseCard should be a sibling of ProgramCard, not a variant. It can still use Card primitive as the outer surface if convenient, but its internal layout is bespoke.

CourseMetaChip already implements the exact 110x104 tile with centered icon + mini-text label (`flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2 w-[110px] h-[104px] bg-surface-1 border border-border-1 rounded-lg`). The decomposition asks for the same primitive but with a 'surface-tertiary (light mint/sand)' background — currently fixed to bg-surface-1. Extend CourseMetaChip with an optional `tone` prop (e.g. `default | mint`) that swaps the background to `bg-brand-lite` or `bg-mint-frost` and tweaks the border, rather than creating a parallel FeatureTile. If the Figma actually renders the existing white-surface tile, no extension is needed and this becomes `reuse-as-is` at build time — the builder should diff against the Figma screenshot before adding the variant. Tile size, radius, text token (`text-mini text-text-secondary`), and structure are all already correct.

Existing Button (base-ui + cva) has variants {default, outline, secondary, ghost, destructive, link} and sizes {default, xs, sm, lg, icon, icon-xs, icon-sm, icon-lg} — none of them produce a mint fill or a pill (rounded-full) shape. All sizes use `rounded-lg` / `rounded-[min(var(--radius-md),...)`. The Figma CTA is a 241x44 pill in `#8EE0CE` (brand-shade) with dark text. Extend the cva by adding a `mint` variant (`bg-brand-shade text-text-secondary [a]:hover:bg-brand-shade/80`) and either a `pill` size or an explicit `shape: 'pill' | 'default'` variant that sets `rounded-full px-6 h-11`. Prefer extending the existing primitive over building a one-off MintPillButton component — keeps the button surface centralized.

design_tokens_used.notes: Mint CTA fill. Already defined in apps/web/src/app/globals.css line 58.
Body / CTA label color. globals.css line 83.

Decomposition called for `border-subtle #e2e2e2`. Closest project token is border-1 (#f4f4f4). If the Figma node actually renders ~#e2e2e2 (slightly darker), border-2 (#f0f0f0) or border-3 (#d2d2d2) may be a better visual match — builder should sample the Figma frame and pick the nearest existing token before introducing a new one.
Candidate background for the 'surface-tertiary (light mint/sand)' feature tile fill mentioned in the decomposition.
Alternate (slightly more saturated) mint tile background. globals.css line 61.
Eyebrow / price / accent color in the right column. globals.css lines 56, 85.
Feature tile label typography. DM Sans 12px / weight 600 / 2.42px tracking. globals.css line 147.
Card title typography candidate (Figma title at y=26 looks h4/h5-sized; confirm exact value during build).
Default card / tile radius per DESIGN.md.
Pill CTA shape. Existing in Tailwind defaults; no new token required.

warnings.message: Decomposition mentions `border-subtle #e2e2e2` but Bodhi has border-1 (#f4f4f4), border-2 (#f0f0f0), border-3 (#d2d2d2). Don't introduce a raw #e2e2e2 — DESIGN.md explicitly forbids new raw colors. Builder should pick the nearest existing token (likely border-2 or border-3) after eyeballing the Figma node.

ProgramCard (vertical, image-top) and the new CourseCard (horizontal, image-left) share name root but not shape. Do NOT extend ProgramCard. Build CourseCard as a sibling primitive in apps/web/src/components/ui/.

CourseMetaChip currently has only one tone (bg-surface-1). The Figma course card may use a mint tile fill. Builder should diff against the Figma render before adding a `tone` prop — if the tiles are actually white-surface, this becomes reuse-as-is.
